The front end of the funnel is going to be using one of the hooks. There's really three main hooks that we're going to be working through, either lead magnet, a case study, straight up hook, or you're going to be using a 14-day trial or performance-based trial hook. So those are pretty much the three main hooks that we're going to be leading with and the front end that you're going to be building. We're going to start off by building the back end.
